expected_base_head: 50412ca Add Score Spine Conductor Glass Reader Sync v1
purpose: Replace raw stacked debug-layer Glass Reader scene with a professional production scene composer where waveform lanes become 3D sound bodies and conductor gestures flow through the audio/cymatic field.
changes: Production mode is now the default Glass Reader mode.
Raw runtime rails, time slices, field traces, event nodes, bridges, and reference points are gated behind Inspect mode instead of appearing in the main production scene.
Waveform body reports are composed into continuous 3D track corridors, so DAW-style waveform lanes become readable volumetric sound bodies.
Conductor gestures are rendered as flowing 3D tube/ribbon motion fields through the sound bodies, not as debug floor lines.
Camera presets added: Studio, Through Wave, Glass Plane, Follow Active.
Active note linkage fixed by matching playhead note identity against body track, note, start, and duration fields.
